scripts.cf:migrate:prod: npx wrangler d1 execute minecraft-fps-db-prod --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql --env production --remote && npx wrangler d1 execute minecraft-fps-db-prod --file=./migrations/0002_auth_security.sql --env production --remote
scripts.cf:deploy:prod: npm run assets:sync && npx wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.rewrite:phase0: npm run parity:harness && npm run smoke:enemy
scripts.rewrite:phase1: npm run rewrite:discover && npm run rewrite:contract:verify
scripts.rewrite:phase2: npm run test:parity:movement && npm run test:parity:collision && npm run test:parity:spawn
scripts.rewrite:phase3: npm run test:parity:weapons && npm run test:parity:throwables && npm run test:parity:classes && npm run test:parity:damage
scripts.rewrite:phase4: npm run test:parity:anim-state && npm run test:parity:skeleton-debug && npm run test:parity:enemy-visual
scripts.rewrite:phase5: npm run test:parity:ui-mode && npm run test:parity:pointer-lock && npm run test:parity:manual
scripts.rewrite:phase6: npm run test:parity:net-snapshot && npm run test:parity:reconcile && npm run test:parity:server-authority && npm run test:parity:auth-flow
scripts.rewrite:matrix: npm run rewrite:phase0 && npm run rewrite:phase1 && npm run rewrite:phase2 && npm run rewrite:phase3 && npm run rewrite:phase4 && npm run rewrite:phase5 && npm run rewrite:phase6 && npm run rewrite:phase7
